creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #28)

I understand that it is not a matter to be considered here.

However, it is unclear what the functions that have become operational due to the resolution of this issue can be used for.
When something that is neither all nor none is selected, the data for the unselected options will remain, but when trying to select it further, jail will no longer exist.
